Company Name @if (form.get('name')?.hasError('required') && form.get('name')?.touched) { Name is required } Email @if (form.get('email')?.hasError('required') && form.get('email')?.touched) { Email is required } @else if (form.get('email')?.hasError('email')) { Enter a valid email } Tax ID / GSTIN (optional)
